features: Your skincare saviour for dehydrated skin - Our Face Facts Hyaluronic Facial Serum is a match for thirsty skin, it helps temporarily reduce the appearance of fine lines & wrinkles and delivers a healthy glow.
Really lightweight formula - Making it easy to use pm or am (just remember your SPF on top for the day).
Hero active is Sodium Hyaluronate - That will help smooth, plump & deliver hyper hydration and glycerine for that added moisturisation.
Glycerin & Betaine - Both deliver added moisturisation, leaving skin soft + supple.
Perfect skin prep - Use before applying makeup for a fresh healthy glow.
description: Product Description Our facial serum is a match for thirsty skin, it helps temporarily reduce the appearance of fine lines & wrinkles and delivers a healthy glow. The hero active is Sodium Hyaluronate, that will help smooth, plump & deliver hyper hydration and Glycerin for that added moisturisation. Ingredients Aqua, Glycerin, DMDM Hydantoin, Polyacrylic Acid, Triethanolamine, Betaine, Parfum, Disodium EDTA, Sodium Hyaluronate, PEG-40 Hydrogenated Castor Oil. Directions Can be used either morning or evening. In the morning, apply a few drops of the serum directly on to the face before applying makeup. Gently massage in to the skin until fully absorbed. In the evening, apply a few drops of the serum directly on to cleansed, dry skin. Gently massage in to the skin until fully absorbed and leave on overnight. Use daily, alongside the Face Facts Hyaluronic collection to complete your skincare routine. Safety Warning For external use only See more
